title: Jonshu's desert dungeons
description: This data pack introduces a new dungeon pool, the Desert Dungeon! This is a desert-themed structure that is a dangerous area & suggested to enter with iron or diamond gear
body:
## **!IMPORTANT!**
- If you want to transfer the mod into the data pack, just rename the .jar to .zip to get the code as a data pack. Thanks!
- You can use this in any public modpacks, I'm all chill with that, no need to credit me in the mod pack (Please just don't copy the datapack & claim it's your own)

This data pack introduces a new dungeon pool, the Desert Dungeon! This is a desert-themed structure that is a dangerous area & suggested to enter with iron or diamond gear. This introduces a new way to use trial vaults & spawners.

Early releases are put into the GitHub page in source code for testing & feedback from the community.


[Discord](https://discord.gg/ufqAY326SV)

This is the first project that I have worked on that is provided to the community, so ot would be great if you guys would give feedback to me about the datapack ty :)
